tasks.title: SIDC field on directory_contacts + milsymbol rendering on MapView (S4-01)
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/005-trust-sidc-sos/{requirements.md, design.md, acceptance/trust-sidc-sos.feature}. SECOND: (REQ-400) confirm directory_contacts.sidc column exists (added in spec/002); if not, add via append-only migration. Backend: extend internal/api/directory.go to accept + persist sidc on POST/PUT. Frontend: (REQ-401) add milsymbol npm dep + update web/src/views/MapView.vue to render pins from sidc. (REQ-402) PeopleView contact detail gains Symbol picker exposing STANAG 4677 reduced set. (REQ-403) sidc=null pin uses a-f-G-U-C default. Tests cover render + picker.
tasks.acceptance_test: go test -count=1 -timeout 60s ./internal/api/... -run TestDirectorySIDC && ssh ansible@nllei01androidsdk01 'cd /home/claude-runner/gitlab/products/cubeos/meshsat/web && npm install && npx playwright test --grep sidc'

tasks.title: Trust levels + QR verify flow + hard-block on precedence ≥ Immediate (S4-02)
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/005-trust-sidc-sos/{requirements.md, design.md, acceptance/trust-sidc-sos.feature}. SECOND: (REQ-404/405) directory_contacts.trust_level + trust_verified_at + trust_verified_by columns (added in spec/002). (REQ-406) ComposeView modal hard-block when (selected_precedence ≥ Immediate AND contact.trust_level < 2); modal has Cancel + 'Send anyway' (latter writes audit trust.gap_overridden). (REQ-407) PeopleView 'Verify in person' opens camera + QR scanner. (REQ-408) on successful scan with matching pubkey → bump trust_level=3 + record verified_at/verified_by. (REQ-409/410) KeyMismatch warning + trust reset on operator-accepted key rotation.
tasks.acceptance_test: go test -count=1 -timeout 60s ./internal/api/... -run TestDirectoryTrust && ssh ansible@nllei01androidsdk01 'cd /home/claude-runner/gitlab/products/cubeos/meshsat/web && npm install && npx playwright test --grep trust'

tasks.title: Contact QR card endpoint + CBOR codec + Ed25519 signature (S4-03)
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/005-trust-sidc-sos/{requirements.md, design.md}. SECOND: (REQ-411) implement GET /api/directory/contacts/{id}/qr returning CBOR-encoded contact card with Ed25519 signature. (REQ-412) payload shape per design.md (v, contact_id, display_name, addresses, signing_pubkey, signature). Use github.com/fxamacker/cbor v2. (REQ-413) TTL-less. Tests cover round-trip + signature verify + invalid contact 404.

tasks.title: Full-width SOS button + 3s-hold/2-tap confirmation + Flash HEMB fan-out + audit + counter (S4-04)
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/005-trust-sidc-sos/{requirements.md, design.md, acceptance/trust-sidc-sos.feature}. SECOND: (REQ-414) extend the status strip from spec/004 with a full-width SOS button at the bottom edge — visible on every view. (REQ-415) confirmation gesture: 3-second-hold OR double-tap within 2 seconds; single tap does NOT fire. Haptic pulse via navigator.vibrate() on Android. (REQ-416) fire path: precedence=Flash, body=location + last-48h contact briefing, strategy=HEMB_BONDED via POST /api/messages/send-to-contact. (REQ-417) audit_log entry sos.fired — must be append-only chain entry. (REQ-418) increment meshsat_sos_fired_total{operator_session_id}.
tasks.acceptance_test: go test -count=1 -timeout 60s ./internal/api/... -run TestSOSFire && ssh ansible@nllei01androidsdk01 'cd /home/claude-runner/gitlab/products/cubeos/meshsat/web && npm install && npx playwright test --grep sos'

tasks.title: USMTF templates skeleton: SALUTE + MEDEVAC 9-line + SITREP + TAK XML option (S4-05)
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/005-trust-sidc-sos/{requirements.md, design.md, acceptance/trust-sidc-sos.feature}. SECOND: (REQ-419) add Templates dropdown to ComposeView. (REQ-420/421/422) implement 3 templates as Vue components rendering the structured fields + a pack() helper producing the slash-delimited body. (REQ-423) when destination=TAK and operator picks Format=XML, also generate MIL-STD-6040 XML alongside the slash form. Tests cover field render + slash pack + XML emit.
tasks.acceptance_test: ssh ansible@nllei01androidsdk01 'cd /home/claude-runner/gitlab/products/cubeos/meshsat/web && npm install && npm test -- --grep usmtf && npx playwright test --grep templates'
